title: Plant Infiltration for Mimulus in Planta Transformation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9k9ao","text":"This protocol is part of a collection for Mimulus in planta transformation. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":42,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":27,"length":47}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"0992A0B087DC11E9936523EAC2E12BB2","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/mi-3tkgnkw/protocols"}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"20vjj","text":"Ideally want 8-12 young healthy plants in square pots that have branched and have lots of buds for infiltration (When plants are young, cut/pinch the plants so that they will be short and branched). \n ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"6m5ql","text":"See SDS (Safety Data Sheet) for hazards and warnings.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Trim off mature buds from the plants.
Gently peel back the leaves around the young buds.
Spray the young buds 2-3 times with the Agro (spray right before they will be put in the vacuum).
Vacuum infiltrate 1-2 plants at a time. pull a vacuum until 29 inches Hg, seal the vacuum andturn off the pump, wait 2 minutes, then release the vacuum.
Mark the plant with a colored sword.
Cover the plants with plastic tent overnight.
Take off plastic and put in tomato cage.
Plant in flats using a salt shaker, about 15-20 seed capsules per flat.
When the seeds start to germinate, begin spraying with 1:1000 Basta.
Continue spraying with Basta every other day.
Pull a vacuum until 29 inches Hg.
Seal the vacuum and turn off the pump.
Transplant the healthy looking, resistant plants.
creator: Andrea Sweigart
